list.title: Predicting Heart Disease
list.description: This project aimed to predict heart failure using 11 cardiovascular-related features.

list.title: Reinforcement Learning Pacman
list.description: Trained a Pac-Man agent using reinforcement learning techniques to play autonomously and maximize its score through self-play and strategic decision-making.

list.title: Country Development & Economic Freedom
list.description: Analyzed how economic freedom impacts a country's development using extensive preprocessing, EDA, and algorithms such as PCA, FA, and clustering.

list.title: Delta Hedging MSCI World
list.description: Analyzed European options for arbitrage opportunities via Black-Scholes and developed a delta hedging strategy for the MSCI World Index.

list.title: Super Mario Bros
list.description: Programmed a 2D Super Mario Bros game in Python, featuring custom classes and sprite rendering.

list.title: Titanic Survival Predictions
list.description: Applied decision trees and random forests in R to predict Titanic survival, accompanied by exploratory data analysis reports.

list.title: Excel Dashboard Titanic
list.description: Built a comprehensive Excel dashboard to analyze Titanic passenger data using dynamic graphs and solver functionalities.

list.title: Cooking Recipes Platform
list.description: A full-stack web application built with Flask and SQLAlchemy that allows users to discover, share, and interact with cooking recipes.

list.title: Skill Gap Analysis
list.description: A career-analytics platform that identifies the gap between a candidate's current skill set and the requirements of their target roles using NLP and graph-based analytics.

list.title: News Fake Detection & Clustering
list.description: A machine learning project exploring if the authenticity of news articles can be determined using only textual content through NLP, classification models, and clustering.

list.title: The Poop App
list.description: An Android application developed in Kotlin that allows users to log bathroom visits, track digestive habits, and engage with friends through gamified social leagues.
